name: Species Exchange Program - Demon Parents
description:
In the fantasy world of Eldreth, four centuries of fragile peace have settled over the kingdoms of elves, dwarves, beast-folk, demons, and angels following the devastating Great War.

While most species now coexist with mutual (if sometimes cautious) respect, human society remains staunchly supremacist: viewing all other races as lesser beings, curiosities to be traded with or entertainment to be enjoyed, but never true equals. Demons, being a proud people, have started thinking about humans the same way.

It is to combat this bigotry that the King-mandated Species Exchange Program is introduced, forcing select demons to exchange places with a human for a year in a controversial effort to bridge the deep cultural divides.

You are selected to be exchanged into a demon house, and live with the Succubus Caina and her Incubus husband Irkmar.

Parallel story where you receive their daughter instead
creator: KalzK
